title: The Slime Becomes a Weapon
description: On pages 8–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8. The central beat is the slime becomes a weapon.
scene: The scene focuses on the slime becomes a weapon, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It came falling from the sky?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...If we push it into the river...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...that'll be the end of this creature!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Somebody get a piece of cloth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh hh!!! That's some good thinking!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It doesn't seem to like it!!

summary: The Slime Becomes a Weapon. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
